_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 0% 12h break rate over 7 days makes HOLD the skilled default, and neither brain has identified a concrete catalyst to break the coil — the analyst's confirmation conditions (stablecoin growth >45, funding <40) are unmet, while the narrative's reversal thesis lacks the accumulation evidence the analyst's factors contradict.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD with medium conviction citing coil persistence and divergent factors; narrative implies impending UP reversal via bottom analog but does not explicitly call direction, creating a directional split
next_move.confirmed_if: stablecoin_growth rises above 45 AND funding cools below 40 with BTC holding $62K — replicates Aug 2024 liquidity accumulation signature
next_move.invalidated_if: funding spikes above 65 OR VIX breaks 70 with BTC below $60K — forced deleveraging triggers Panic/Capitulation leg down
